svg.text: Media Assets Marketing Agent — End-to-End GraphRAG Pipeline
Ingestion · Object Extraction · Vector Embeddings · Knowledge Graph · Multi-Mode Retrieval
+ matched image asset filenames for the Explorer app
INGESTION DETAIL — ingest.py (Gemini Vision Prompt → 5-Chunk Strategy)
Each image is analyzed with a detailed prompt that extracts:
— exhaustive list of every visible item/prop/animal
— indoor/outdoor, architecture, time of day, geography
— shot type, angle, lighting, focus, post-processing
— 3-5 mood descriptors, energy level, emotional tone
Splitting maximizes entity extraction & graph connectivity:
Grounds identity: what IS this image
Full chunk enables LightRAG to find cross-domain entity links
2. For each image: base64 encode + send to Gemini API
Media Assets Marketing Agent — LightRAG GraphRAG Pipeline · 419 images · 2,095 chunks · 2,094 entities · 2,039 relations · 1536-dim embeddings
